title: Fel's Machine Guns II
description: A mod that adds heavy machine guns to Minecraft.
body:
#                                  Fel's Machine Guns II

![awa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbc92a8053ef948292b5bc804235aeece0c3b302.png)

 

This is a mod which adds some heavy machine guns to your Minecraft game, helping you defending your base.

**Note: This mod is a base, and to get more content you must install addons. I made the mod this way to keep compatibility with 1.20.1.**

Addon List:
- [FMGII: German Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fmgii-german-pack)


 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1F0l9ZuFa94" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FCLWGJ5ffMY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe> 

 

## Mod Features:
 

- Immersive shooting and aiming.
- Advanced animated reloads.
- Lightweight mod.
- Available for 1.20.1 and 1.21.1
 
![kkk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/870a86c53dd4ebf0f871c1fdba305292726b77d2.png)
 

 
 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### Quick Guide how to use them: (Legacy version)

1- With the correct belt with bullets shift-click your mg to open, then right click the gun again this time without shift and you will mount on the mg, then press B for pull the trigger and presto your gun is ready to fire.

2- Weapons with manual elevation trigger press Up and Down arrows to calibrate it.

3- Don't forget to set a key for the shooting button cuz it's disabled by default (for some reason it is not letting me to set mouse button by default, anyways I will try to fix it later).

</details>


## Note: This mod requires Gecko Lib and Iguana Lib to work.
